summary: Client Profile View Feature Testing - Backend: 16/17 tests passed (94%), Frontend: UI verified working. One critical backend bug found: GET /api/appointments endpoint does not support client_id filtering.

critical.issue: Does not support client_id query parameter filtering. Returns all therapist appointments regardless of client_id parameter. This causes the Sessions tab in ClientProfileView to show appointments from ALL clients instead of just the selected client.
critical.suggested_fix: Add client_id parameter to get_appointments function and filter query when provided

integration_issues.issue: Shows appointments from all clients due to backend not filtering by client_id

accessibility_warnings.issue: Console warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for screen reader accessibility

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Update GET /api/appointments endpoint to support client_id query parameter filtering (similar to how GET /api/assessments and GET /api/homework already do)
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/appointments (line 2543) missing client_id parameter - inconsistent with other endpoints like GET /api/assessments (line 4278) and GET /api/homework (line 4433) which properly support client_id filtering
seed_data_creation: Used existing test clients from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Profile View feature mostly working. Backend bug in GET /api/appointments needs fix to support client_id filtering. All other endpoints (assessments, homework, session-notes, payments, case-history, therapy-consent) properly support client_id filtering.

view_profile_button.notes: View Profile button appears on all client cards in Client Management page

client_profile_modal.notes: Modal opens correctly when clicking View Profile button

modal_header.notes: Shows client name, client ID, phone, and email correctly

status_badges.notes: Shows Consent Signed/Pending and Case History Complete/Pending badges correctly

quick_stats_row.notes: Shows Sessions Done, Upcoming, Session Notes, Assessments, and Total Paid

overview_tab.notes: Shows Next Appointment, Last Session, Case History summary, Therapy Consent summary, Recent Session Notes

sessions_tab.notes: UI works but shows ALL appointments due to backend bug - not filtered by client_id

case_history_tab.notes: Displays case history details with View/Edit button

assessments_tab.notes: Shows completed/pending assessments correctly filtered by client_id

payments_tab.notes: Shows payment history and totals correctly filtered by client_id

get_assessments_client_filter.notes: Returns filtered assessments for therapist correctly

get_homework_client_filter.notes: Returns filtered homework for therapist correctly

get_appointments_client_filter.notes: Does NOT filter by client_id - returns all therapist appointments

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/appointments?client_id={id} - FAIL - Does not filter by client_id

elements_verified: Client cards with View Profile, Edit, Reset Password buttons
Header with client avatar, name, ID, phone, email
Status badges (Consent Signed, Case History Complete)
Quick stats row (Sessions Done, Upcoming, Session Notes, Assessments, Total Paid)
Tab navigation (Overview, Sessions, Case History, Assessments, Payments)
Overview tab content (Next Appointment, Last Session, Case History, Therapy Consent, Recent Session Notes)
Sessions tab content (Completed, Upcoming, Cancelled stats, All Appointments list)
